families.stage-background: Full-screen 1280x720 scene background: deep #0F172A space with a perspective neon grid floor receding to a glowing horizon, faint scanlines, subtle vignette. Keep the center-third calm so UI can sit on top.
families.panel: UI panel plate on transparent background: rounded-chamfered rectangle, #1E293B surface at ~92% opacity, 1px neon cyan edge stroke with soft outer glow, faint inner grid texture.
families.bar: Horizontal song-list bar plate on transparent background: chamfered rectangle, subtle left accent edge, #1E293B surface. 'Selected' variants swap the edge glow to bright cyan with a stronger outer glow.
families.bitmap-font: Single glyph on transparent background: geometric Orbitron-like digit/symbol, uniform stroke, filled #F1F5F9 with a tight cyan outer glow. One glyph per image; compose assembles the sheet.
families.badge: Emblem on transparent background: bold chamfered shield/plate with a large glowing rank letter, metallic-free flat neon styling.
families.effect: Additive-blend effect sprite on black background: bright neon burst/flare with hot white core and cyan-to-magenta falloff, designed to read at small size during fast gameplay.
families.drumkit: Stylized drum-kit piece on transparent background: dark matte body with neon cyan rim highlights, slight top-down 3/4 view, flat-shaded, no photorealism.
families.overlay: Full-screen 1280x720 overlay on transparent/black background as described; must not obscure the lane area's readability.

Graphics/1_background.jpg.desc: Startup/boot: dimmest variant, near-black, a single thin cyan horizon line, no grid floor yet.

Graphics/2_background.jpg.desc: Title: hero variant, bold grid floor, magenta sun-disc with scanline cuts low on the horizon.

Graphics/4_background.png.desc: Config: muted variant, grid dimmed to ~30%, left third slightly darker to seat the menu column.

Graphics/5_background.jpg.desc: Song select: energetic variant, grid plus faint floating translucent panels bokeh.

Graphics/6_background.jpg.desc: Song transition: motion variant, grid with horizontal light-streak blur suggesting speed.

Graphics/7_background.jpg.desc: Performance: calmest variant, very dark, grid at 15%, all glow pushed to the outer edges away from lanes.

Graphics/8_background.jpg.desc: Result: celebratory variant, upward light rays and drifting neon particles.

Graphics/2_menu.png.desc: Title menu strip: three stacked row plates (GAME START / OPTION / EXIT geometry per NX sheet), row height uniform; include a brighter 'focused row' band.

Graphics/4_header panel.png.desc: Config header band 1280x105: full-width top bar, cyan baseline stroke.

Graphics/4_footer panel.png.desc: Config footer band 1280x30: slim full-width bar.

Graphics/4_menu cursor.png.desc: Config category cursor: glowing cyan selection band, semi-transparent fill.

Graphics/4_item bar.png.desc: Config vertical divider 18x720: thin neon rule with soft glow.

Graphics/4_itembox.png.desc: Config item row plate: low-contrast, sits in a repeated list.

Graphics/4_itembox cursor.png.desc: Config item cursor: bright cyan-edged row highlight.

Graphics/5_header panel.png.desc: Song select header band: full-width, houses title text; keep center clear.

Graphics/5_footer panel.png.desc: Song select footer band: full-width slim bar.

Graphics/5_status panel.png.desc: Song status plate: large left-side vertical panel with faint internal separators.

Graphics/5_BPM.png.desc: BPM chip 187x67: small plate with a subtle metronome-pulse motif.

Graphics/5_play history panel.png.desc: Play history plate 458x151 with 5 faint row rules.

Graphics/5_difficulty panel.png.desc: Difficulty grid plate: cells for difficulty x instrument matrix, thin cell rules.

Graphics/5_difficulty frame.png.desc: Difficulty cell cursor: bright cyan cell outline with corner ticks.

Graphics/5_graph panel drums.png.desc: Note-distribution graph plate, drums variant: slim vertical bars motif area.

Graphics/5_graph panel guitar bass.png.desc: Graph plate, guitar/bass variant of the above.

Graphics/5_comment bar.png.desc: Comment strip: wide slim plate for artist/comment text.

Graphics/5_preimage panel.png.desc: Preview-image ornate frame: chamfered frame with corner glow accents.

Graphics/5_scrollbar.png.desc: Scrollbar: slim vertical track with glowing thumb.

Graphics/5_bar box.png.desc: Folder bar: adds a small folder glyph zone at left.

Graphics/5_default_preview.png.desc: Default song jacket: neon vinyl-record motif on dark plate.

Graphics/5_preimage default.png.desc: Default result jacket: same vinyl motif, result styling.

Graphics/5_level number.png.desc: Level digits sheet 250x28: glyphs 0-9 (20x28 cells), '.', '-', '?'. Generate one glyph per image.

Graphics/5_skill max.png.desc: MAX badge 53x20: glowing magenta MAX plate.

Graphics/5_skill icon.png.desc: Rank icon strip 350x53, ten 35px cells: SS S A B C D E F + FC badge + Excellent badge; generate each cell separately.

Graphics/6_Difficulty.png.desc: Difficulty label sheet 262x600 (50px rows): MASTER/BASIC/ADVANCED/EXTREME/REAL wordplates; generate each row separately, uniform typography.

Graphics/7_Difficulty.png.desc: Performance difficulty badge sheet 60x720 (twelve 60x60 cells); generate per-cell colored chips keyed to difficulty.

Graphics/7_chips_drums.png.desc: Drum note chips sheet: per-lane note rectangles with distinct neon hues (cyan hi-hat, red snare-accent, magenta toms family, yellow cymbals, white kick bar), hot core + glow; generate one chip per lane cell.

Graphics/7_longnotes.png.desc: Long-note body/cap atlas: glowing beam segments matching chip hues.

Graphics/7_Paret.png.desc: Lane background strips sheet: dark vertical strips with per-lane tint at 10-15% and thin edge rules.

Graphics/7_lanes_Cover_cls.png.desc: Lane cover for hidden-lane mode: opaque dark shutter with grid texture.

Graphics/7_shutter.png.desc: Stage shutter: full-width dark panel with neon center seam.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums hit-bar.png.desc: Judgement line: horizontal bright cyan bar, hot white core, subtle end flares.

Graphics/7_explosion.png.desc: Hit explosion frames: radial neon burst, generate 2-4 frames as separate images.

Graphics/hit_fx.png.desc: Hit effect sprite sheet frames: compact cyan ring-burst.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_red.p.desc: Legacy chip fire, red hue master flame column.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_LC.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire MASTER (left cymbal): vertical neon flame column; all other lanes derive via hueshift.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_HH.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (hi-hat): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_LP.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (left pedal / hi-hat pedal): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_SD.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (snare drum): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_HT.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (high tom): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_BD.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (bass/kick drum): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_LT.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (low tom): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_FT.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (floor tom): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_CY.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (crash cymbal): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip fire_RD.pn.desc: Per-lane chip fire (ride cymbal): same vertical neon flame column silhouette as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_LC.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star MASTER: four-point neon star sparkle; other lanes derive via hueshift.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_HH.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (hi-hat): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_LP.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (left pedal / hi-hat pedal): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_SD.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (snare drum): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_HT.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (high tom): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_BD.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (bass/kick drum): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_LT.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (low tom): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_FT.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (floor tom): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_CY.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (crash cymbal): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/ScreenPlayDrums chip star_RD.pn.desc: Per-lane chip star (ride cymbal): same four-point neon star sparkle as the LC master, generated as its own master until a hueshift recipe links it in manifest.json.

Graphics/7_judge.png.desc: Judgement words sheet: PERFECT/GREAT/GOOD/POOR/MISS word plates, one per image; PERFECT cyan-white, MISS red.

Graphics/7_JudgeStrings_XG.png.desc: XG judgement words sheet: same words, condensed style.

Graphics/7_Gauge.png.desc: Life gauge frame: horizontal chamfered frame with tick marks.

Graphics/7_gauge_bar.png.desc: Gauge fill: cyan-to-green gradient bar with glow, danger zone red at low end.

Graphics/7_Drum_Progress_bg.png.desc: Song progress track: slim vertical/horizontal frame.

Graphics/7_progress_fill.png.desc: Progress fill strip: soft cyan bar.

Graphics/7_SkillPanel.png.desc: Skill panel plate (also reused on result stage).

Graphics/7_SkillPanel_perf.png.desc: Performance-stage skill panel plate (no baked LEVEL/PLAY rows; the play screen draws the difficulty badge + level digits there). Referenced by Theme.ini Performance.SkillPanelTexture.

Graphics/7_panel_icons.jpg.desc: Panel icon strip: small instrument/mode glyph chips.

Graphics/7_pads.png.desc: Pad indicator sheet, 2 rows (idle/pressed): per-lane pad caps; pressed row adds bright glow.

Graphics/7_stage_failed.jpg.desc: Stage failed: dark red-tinted vignette, glitch-scanline motif, large FAILED plate zone.

Graphics/7_FullCombo.png.desc: Full combo celebration: radial gold-cyan rays with FULL COMBO plate zone.

Graphics/7_Danger.png.desc: Danger tile (tiling): red pulsing edge warning strip, seamless horizontal tile.

Graphics/7_pause_overlay.png.desc: Pause: dark scrim with centered PAUSED plate and thin frame.

Graphics/8_rankSS.png.desc: Rank SS: double-S emblem, white-cyan, most radiant.

Graphics/ScreenResult StageCleared.png.desc: STAGE CLEARED word plate: wide banner, cyan glow.

Graphics/ScreenResult Excellent.png.desc: EXCELLENT word plate: magenta-white, most celebratory.

Graphics/Console font 8x16.png.desc: Console font sheet 8x16 cells, full ASCII: crisp monospace pixel-style glyphs, #F1F5F9 on transparent. Generate as a full-sheet exception (glyph grid), pixel-exact.

Graphics/Console font 2 8x16.png.desc: Console font secondary sheet: dimmed variant of the above.

Graphics/drumkit_skeleton.png.desc: Kit hardware/stands, drawn behind the pieces.
